Logistics Solutions

Our Shipping Services

From critical business documents to heavy manufacturing machinery, we provide custom routes and timelines that match your budget.

International Courier

Reliable and fast door-to-door courier service for documents and parcels worldwide.

  • Customs clearance assistance
  • End-to-end real-time tracking
  • Express delivery within 3-5 business days
  • Secure tamper-proof packaging
Book This Shipment

Document Courier

Express and highly confidential handling for critical business documents and passports.

  • Priority shipping lane
  • Tamper-evident document pouches
  • Signature on delivery required
  • Next-day delivery available in major hubs
Book This Shipment

Express Delivery

Time-definite international deliveries with guaranteed speed and custom-fit routes.

  • Money-back delivery guarantee
  • 24/7 dedicated support desk
  • Priority boarding on international cargo flights
  • Immediate delivery notifications
Book This Shipment

Air Cargo

Global air freight services for heavy machinery, fragile parts, and bulk shipments.

  • Charter flights and consolidation options
  • Specialized oversized cargo handling
  • DDP & DDU custom clearance terms
  • Airport-to-airport & airport-to-door delivery
Book This Shipment

Commercial Cargo

Tailored supply chain and freight forwarding services for commercial exporters.

  • Complete import/export documentation setup
  • Multi-modal transit capabilities
  • Sea-Air combined shipping solutions
  • Warehousing and consolidation services
Book This Shipment

Door Pickup Service

Convenient parcel pickup right from your home or warehouse across Ahmedabad.

  • Free scheduled pickup
  • Weighing and documentation at your doorstep
  • Instant consignment note generation
  • Flexible pickup windows
Book This Shipment

Parcel Packing

Professional, export-grade packaging solutions ensuring transit durability.

  • Double-walled cardboard boxes
  • Wooden crating for fragile goods
  • Vacuum sealing for food items
  • Strict compliance with airline packaging rules
Book This Shipment

Business Shipping

End-to-end logistics solutions customized for corporate entities and manufacturers.

  • Dedicated account managers
  • Volume-based corporate discounts
  • Custom API integration for order tracking
  • Consolidated monthly invoicing
Book This Shipment

Medicine Delivery

Safe, speed-focused shipping of life-saving medicines with cold-chain features.

  • FDA documentation assistance
  • Temperature-controlled packaging options
  • Express priority custom clearance
  • Daily dispatch to Europe, USA, and GCC
Book This Shipment

Student Parcel

Specially discounted excess baggage and document courier for university students.

  • Up to 25% student discount
  • Books and personal items packaging
  • University application document courier
  • Free home pickup
Book This Shipment

E-commerce Logistics

Direct-to-consumer international shipping for local e-commerce brands.

  • Seamless Shopify & WooCommerce plugins
  • Low weight-break rates
  • Automated returns processing
  • Full API visibility for buyers
Book This Shipment

Import Export Logistics

B2B import/export facilitation including customs clearance at Ahmedabad Air Cargo.

  • Customs house agent (CHA) services
  • Duty computation and advisory
  • Temporary import/export bonding
  • Fast clearance for air freights
Book This Shipment
Work Process

How VEER Handles Shipments

1

Booking

Submit details online or call us

2

Pickup

Free parcel collection from your doorstep

3

Packaging

Export-grade safety layering & weighing

4

Warehouse

Sorting and custom document preparation

5

Flight Dispatch

Express flight departure from Ahmedabad

6

Destination Country

Port of entry landing and verification

7

Customs Clearance

Import duties processing and approval

8

Out for Delivery

Handed over to the local last-mile courier

9

Delivered

Safe delivery and digital signature capture

Need Custom Pricing?

We offer bespoke contracts for corporate businesses, local manufacturing hubs, and regular e-commerce exporters. Save up to 35% on standard shipping costs.
